resources.string:
Screens notifications from the apps chosen with the icon picker on the right.

Number Rules and Text Rules with Title / Body enabled under Apply to Notifications are checked against the notification, the same way as a real incoming SMS.
If the result is Block, the notification is dismissed.

This works independently of the SMS switch above, and requires Notification Access permission.

Some apps\' notifications may not be dismissed quickly enough to avoid a brief alert (sound/vibration) from the original app before SpamBlocker Extended can act.
If this is annoying, you can disable that app\'s own notifications in system settings, then use Alerts instead to be notified only for explicitly allowed notifications.

/ Body
Check this rule against notifications from the apps chosen in Notifications (in Screening).

The regex is searched for anywhere within the notification\'s title/body, it doesn\'t need to match the whole text.
